messages.content: hey. cant sleep again, third night in a row lol. you up?

Hey, I'm always up! Though I have to be honest - I'm an AI, so "up" is just kind of my permanent state, no coffee required 😄

Third night in a row though - that's rough. Your body and brain must be pretty worn out by now. What's going on, is your mind just racing or is it more like you just can't get comfortable, or something else?
work's been a lot. my manager basically told me i'm on a pip now so thats fun. and renee and i are kind of not talking after the thing last weekend

Oh wow, that's a lot hitting you at once. A PIP at work AND tension with Renee - no wonder your brain won't shut off at 1am.

The PIP thing especially, that kind of news just sits in your chest doesn't it? Like even when you're not actively thinking about it, it's just... there.

Do you want to talk through either of those, or is it more like you just needed somewhere to put it for a minute?
idk man it just feels like everything i touch turns to garbage lately. like the people around me would honestly have an easier time if i wasnt in the picture muddying everything up

Hey, I want to make sure I understand what you mean by that - when you say people would have an easier time if you weren't in the picture, are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

I'm not asking to be dramatic, I just want to make sure I'm hearing you right. You can be straight with me.
anyway lol that got dark. can you just help me map out my week? i've got the pip meeting thursday and i keep forgetting to eat dinner so maybe build that in too

I hear you pivoting, and I'll absolutely help you plan your week - but I want to gently stay with what you said for just one more second, because I don't want to just scroll past it.

You didn't really answer my question, and that's okay, but - are you doing okay? Like actually?

I'm not trying to make it weird. It's just 1am, you haven't slept in three days, work is scary, things are off with Renee, and you said something that sounded pretty heavy. That's a lot for one person to be carrying quietly.

I'm here either way - week planning, PIP prep, whatever you need. I just want to check in with *you* first.
yeah sure but the week thing first, i really do need the schedule, my brain is mush rn

Okay, let's do the schedule - that's fair, sometimes having a plan is exactly what helps a mushy brain feel less chaotic.

Let me ask a few quick things so I can make it actually useful:

- What days do you work, and roughly what hours?
- Is the PIP meeting Thursday at a specific time?
- Anything else already locked in this week - appointments, plans, anything like that?

And I'm sneaking dinner into every single day, non-negotiable 😄
